api_key.description: Optional openFDA API key, sent as the api_key query parameter to raise rate limits. openFDA works credential-free; when unset, requests are sent unauthenticated (public tier).

base_url.description: openFDA API base URL override for tests or proxies.

search.description: Optional openFDA search query string, applied to every stream via the search query parameter. Absent when unset (unfiltered).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
